arguments.reason: The proposal identifies the concrete misuse of the RG type-code validator for allowed_membership_types, explains why that rejects external registered type codes before repository resolution, and gives a scoped fix in real domain/service/test files while preserving parent/type validation and membership mutation behavior. Confidence is above the accept threshold.
